response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with 6+ years in senior roles, directly aligning with the mid-senior level requirement. His profile showcases leadership in scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests/sec), AI-agent infrastructure, and a strong focus on clean, testable code. The primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) matches well, and his diverse background in databases, cloud platforms, and testing frameworks covers most required technical skills.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js/React stack
Proven track record building scalable systems and high-performance services
Relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js experience
Secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) are present but not highlighted as primary
Some roles focus on non-enterprise contexts (e.g., open-source GIS platform)
